hooks.command: filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$filepath" in *.ts|*.tsx) pnpm lint --fix --no-warn-ignored "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; exit 0 ;; esac

filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$filepath" in */pnpm-lock.yaml) echo 'BLOCKED: No editar lock files — usar pnpm install'; exit 2 ;; *.env|*.env.*) echo 'BLOCKED: No editar archivos .env — contienen secretos'; exit 2 ;; esac; exit 0
